one_line_verdict: A wickedly fun genre sequel for fans of the original — best enjoyed with a rowdy crowd in theaters for maximum screams and laughs.
good_for: fans of the original Ready or Not
not_good_for: those unfamiliar with the first film
english_note: Mostly casual dialogue with dark humor; no heavy accents or dense jargon — very accessible.
credits_detail: Likely contains a mid-credits or post-credits teaser hinting at franchise expansion — speculative based on sequel setup.
one_line_summary: Grace is back and the body count just doubled — four families, one throne, zero mercy.
